name: Thai Iced Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Brew coffee in a drip-style coffee maker or percolator using the specified amounts.
2. Fill four 10 to 12 ounce beverage glasses with ice cubes to the rim.
3. Pour two thirds full with coffee into each glass.
4. Stir in about 2 tablespoons of evaporated milk, a dash of ground cardamom, and sweeten to taste with sugar.
